description_long: This bed features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular wooden frame and a prominent headboard. The frame is finished in a dark color, contrasting with the lighter wood tones of the headboard and footboard. The mattress is topped with a sleek, black bedding set, and two rectangular pillows are neatly arranged at the head of the bed. The bed sits low to the ground, giving it a contemporary platform appearance. The surfaces are smooth and clean, with no visible decorative elements or storage compartments. The overall look is functional and stylish, suitable for urban interiors or modern living spaces.
description: A modern platform bed with a dark frame, wooden headboard and footboard, black bedding, and two pillows, featuring a sleek and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden headboard, black frame, and two pillows on the mattress.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headboard, two pillows, and the full width of the black bedding.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden footboard, black frame, and pillows at the far end.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden footboard and the solid black frame, with no bedding or pillows visible.
